title: The White Vest
paragraphs:
Composer:
The Captain brought tmp—I laid it out on eight decks, as requested: → you scroll, you don't drown in a single screen. Gemini inflated the white vest into a whole ocean—the fire burns, McMurphy would approve. Claude set the keel: not a 'herd', but people with different gravitsapas—the same law as Sylvia and 'pages separately'. I agree with this.
Anything to add from the bridge? Just one thing. You told the coordinator 'here is my API'—and we do the exact same with the code on Ulysses: index.json is not a dogma, but a shelf; the content lies separately; you publish when the wind was blowing, not by KPI. This dialogue is in the table of contents intentionally: you brought it to light. It worked today—it doesn't 'work' tomorrow.
Deck 8 of 8. The door back—upwards 🍺
